---
title: "HIV Virus"
permalink: "/blog/hiv-virus"
categories: "Science"
output:
  output:
 html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {
  rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding, output_dir = "../_posts") })

layout: single
bibliography: refs.bib
link-citations: true
defaults:
- scope:
    path: ''
    type: posts
  values:
    author_profile: false
    read_time: true
    comments: true
    share: true
    related: true
    breadcrumbs: false
tags: reading, biotechnology
---

`what is happening`
